mapper.select: select SYS_ID , COALESCE(SYS_NAME,'') as SYS_NAME , COALESCE(SYS_TYPE,'') as SYS_TYPE , COALESCE(SYS_DEPTH,0) as SYS_DEPTH , COALESCE(SYS_POSITION,0) as SYS_POSITION , COALESCE(SYS_ID_UP,'') as SYS_ID_UP from master.TN_SYSINFO where delete_yn='N';
mapper.insert: insert into master.tn_sysinfo (sys_id, sys_name, sys_type, sys_depth, sys_position, sys_id_up, admin_id_create, admin_id_update, create_datetime, update_datetime, note, delete_yn, level_yn) select #{newSystemId}, #{newSystemId}, sys_type, sys_depth+1, 1, #{newSystemId}, 'WEEDS', 'WEEDS', now(), now(), '', delete_yn, level_yn from master.tn_sysinfo where sys_id=#{parentSystemId}
mapper.select: select A.trace_id as traceId , B.sys_id as sysId1 , COALESCE(C.sys_id,'') as sysId2 , COALESCE(D.sys_id,'') as sysId3 , COALESCE(E.sys_id,'') as sysId4 , COALESCE(F.sys_id,'') as sysId5 from master.tn_traceinfo A join master.tn_sysinfo B ON A.sys_id = B.sys_id left outer join master.tn_sysinfo C ON B.sys_id_up = C.sys_id left outer join master.tn_sysinfo D ON C.sys_id_up = D.sys_id left outer join master.tn_sysinfo E ON D.sys_id_up = E.sys_id left outer join master.tn_sysinfo F ON E.sys_id_up = E.sys_id where A.delete_yn='N'
